# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official node runtime as parent image
FROM node:14-alpine

# Set working directory in docker container 
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json to working dir
COPY package*.json ./

# Install NodeJS packages using npm 
RUN npm install

# Copy the rest of our app's source code from your host machine
COPY . .

# Compile app for production with minification
RUN npm run build

# Bind container port to host port
EXPOSE 3000

# Run app.js using node when the container starts
CMD [ "node", "serve.js" ]
